case_title: ERIKA PEREZ VS. FORTE'PROTECTIVE SERVICES,INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT FORTE'PROTECTIVE SERVICES,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ERIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORTE'PROTECTIVE SERVICES,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $4,434.19 PRINCIPAL, $160.63 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,594.82, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
